name: Image Trail
description: DOM-based cursor trail that stamps images along the mouse path with entry/exit animations.

images.description: Array of image URL strings to stamp along cursor path

trailLength.description: Maximum number of visible trail images

spawnDistance.description: Minimum cursor travel distance (px) before spawning next image

className.description: CSS class for the trail container overlay

conflicts: DOM-based — many trail items cause layout thrash
relies on mouse movement, no touch equivalent
global overlay may intercept clicks if z-index conflicts
